target: 43. Ushio's Video ②
(...And so the two of us came to Mt. Takanosu.)
Why're ya following me?
You're the one following me!? I'm the one who said I was going to Mt. Takanosu!
I made a promise to Shiori-chan! I'm going to investigate the Shadows! I told you not to worry!!
Oh, really!?
That's right!! If you make even the slightest weird move, I'll beat you up!!
Got it!!
(We've walked around quite a bit, but haven't found anything. We're out of time for today, gotta head down the mountain before it gets dark...)
Hey, come look at this!!
What's wrong?
Look, there's a path up ahead. But...
"Danger: No Entry Beyond This Point"—
Doesn't seeing a sign like this make you want to go in?
I get that.
But it's gonna get dark soon—
Hup.
Ah! Hey!?
I'm telling you it's bad if we don't go back now!! Are you listening~~~!?
...You're not gonna listen, are you... Jeez!!
I said wait! I'm coming too!!
Oh...!! This place is...
Look, that sign... "Hishigata Clinic." Isn't this Sou's family's old clinic!?
Seems like it. The one rumored to be haunted...
It's my first time seeing it...
…Let's look inside through the window.
Y-Yeah...
Whoa~~~, it's completely trashed inside too... scary...!! I'm... really bad with ghosts...
You too?!
You're sure marching right in despite that!
…This must be the entrance.
Wait... you're planning to go inside!? Are you okay with this!?
I'm not okay with it, but... But... I don't know...
I feel like... I've been here before...
Wh-Who is it!! Is someone there!?
(Wh-What is... that...?)
Ugh!
What?!
(Th... That black thing's shape... is steadily becoming more human-like...)
(That face is mine!! I-Is this... a <color=#GF_TIPS_101>Shadow</color>!?)
Look out!!
Th-Thanks...
(Wh-What was that just now... It felt like my arm suddenly stretched out...?)
Wh-What is that... Its shape is changing again...

Guh…!!
Ugh…!
L-Let go!! Damn it! What is this... damn it!!
Y-You...! Let go of her!!
Ugh…!
(No way... it's not working?)
Take this!!
(Oh no——)
Gah!
*Cough, cough*!
(It worked...!? Even though it missed... what does this mean!?)
Gih...!
Whoa!?
(I got stabbed!? It wasn't my leg that got stabbed, but...! This pain...!)
(C-Could it be... the Shadow's weak point is...)
(Yeah... I get it...! I just clearly understood it with my own body...!)
Vaaaah!!
Here it comes!!
(I'm not human——)
(My main body is the 2D shadow— The 3D body is—)
(A weapon to protect the 2D form...!!!)
…Hah, hah…!!
You... Wh-What was that just now...
That was amazing!!! You're super cool!!
...I know, right!!
Here, can you stand? Grab my hand!
Yeah…
...You injured your leg, right. We need to treat it!
This wound won't heal even if you treat it... The original data was damaged...
Data!?
I'm a Shadow. I copied you at the beach cleanup. I remembered that much...
...But I just can't remember anything before that. I think I probably "overwrote" it.
Overwrite... what do you mean?
I wasn't supposed to erase my original parts as a Shadow, but I overwrote my Shadow self with Ushio Kofune's data... and erased it.
That's why I think of myself as Ushio Kofune... Haha... I'm an idiot...
Maybe the copy failed? I don't know at this point...
Or maybe I was just... a defect...
Then you should just overwrite it again! That'll heal your injury, right!?
Th-Theoretically... But, is that okay...? I'm... your Shadow, you know?
It's fine, it's fine!!
If you hadn't protected me, I would have died! I don't want to owe myself a favor, it's creepy!!
Are my shoes and socks in the way? Wait a sec. I'll take them off right now.
Here! Now we're even!!
I won't say thanks!! Saying thank you to myself... it's too creepy, I can't say it!!
Alright, here goes.
Woooow!! It's healed!
I didn't copy your memories. Or rather, I can't...
If I overwrote everything again, I wouldn't be me anymore... So I just copied the data for your right leg.
It feels like "data"?
I can't explain it well, but something like that. But I think... this copied data will disappear after a while...
If we erase the original, the copy becomes the original and can continue to exist in this world...
Erase... you mean... kill? Will you disappear if I don't die!?
Probably... I don't know for sure, but I just have that feeling in my head.
Normally, I'd probably have to kill the original...
Wh... what the heck... Seeing a Shadow means you'll die... So that's what it meant...!!
Shiori-chan is in danger...!!
...We need to go back. It's not safe here either.
July 19
(The next day, the 19th, it poured rain...)
(We tried all sorts of experiments to see what Shadows could do.)
(...To state the conclusion—)
(With her power, it seems like we can defeat the Shadows.)
(…That night…)
(She watched over Shiori-chan all night long. Apparently Shadows don't need sleep.)
(...We can't drag anyone else into something this dangerous. The two of us have to do something about it ourselves...)
(…But…)
(If we fight the Shadows, our lives will be in danger.)
(That's why, just in case something happens, I wanted to leave the truth behind...)
July 20
(...July 20th. We're recording this video like this.)
I don't know what kind of situation you're in right now, Shinpei, but—
I'll do what I need to do. You do what you need to do, Shinpei.
What else was there… Oh right!
Sorry I won't be able to see you off properly on the day you leave for Tokyo! I'm cheering for you, Shinpei!!
See ya! Bye-bye!
